title: AAP grant reference (broker profile, section 4.2)
description: The one fully pinned AAP wire artifact: the opaque logical grant name an agent presents to the broker. ABNF: grant-reference = "grant://" 1*(unreserved), with unreserved per RFC 3986 (ALPHA / DIGIT / "-" / "." / "_" / "~"). Deliberately less expressive than backend-and-path schemes; it MUST NOT encode a backend, path, or credential shape.
